title: A Shade Totem
description: This is a resource pack where totems are "A Shade" from the game Hollow Knight. It also has custom sound effects! I really hope you like it!!!
body:
This is a custom totem pack referencing the character "A Shade" from the famous game Hollow Knight. It includes custom sound effects.

i really hope you love this pack i spent alot of time on it♥♥♥♥♥♥♥
